notes: Chapter-scoped Oak Challenge Catch List (deck slot 8) for c5: 6 rows = the Professor Oak Challenge achievements (src-ra-oak, game 24140) that must be completed before that chapter's badge milestone.

Chapter placement follows the C Oak Guide (src-oak-pdf): catches are segmented by the badge before which they count, verified against each badge achievement's 'all N possible Pokémon' requirement (46/77/109/142/150/154/154/170/174/203/206). Badge order per the Oak guide: Pryce's Glacier badge segment -> c6, Jasmine+Chuck's Mineral/Storm -> c5.
